title: Senior Software Development Engineer in Test (SR.SDET)-Unit Testing C++- 5 to 10 Years -Pune-Hybrid-Immediate Joiners only
company: SpurQLabs | Next-Generation Software Testing & Test Automation Services
description:
**Company Description** 




 SpurQLabs is an Independent Software Testing and Test Automation company dedicated to helping clients deliver high\\-quality products efficiently and cost\\-effectively. With expertise in areas like manual testing, automated testing for web, API, and mobile applications, cross\\-device testing, and performance testing, we serve as a trusted partner for startups and enterprises. Our mission is to enhance customer experience and boost operational efficiency through innovative approaches to software quality assurance. We embrace core values of creativity, transparency, responsibility, compassion, and continuous improvement, fostering an environment that prioritizes excellence and innovation.
 



  





**Role Description** 




 We are looking for a C\\+\\+ SDET (Software Development Engineer in Test) who combines strong C\\+\\+ development skills with deep expertise in test automation and quality engineering.
 



 In this role, you will design and develop scalable automated testing frameworks, build high\\-quality validation pipelines, and work closely with engineering teams to ensure that software systems are reliable, performant, and production\\-ready.
 



 You will collaborate with developers, product teams, and DevOps engineers to integrate automated testing into the software development lifecycle, enabling faster and more confident releases.
 



  





**Qualifications** 



* Design, develop, and maintain automated test frameworks using modern C\\+\\+.
* Build robust test harnesses and validation tools for complex software systems.
* Develop unit, integration, system, and performance tests to ensure product quality.
* Work closely with development teams to ensure testability, reliability, and code quality.
* Automate test execution within CI/CD pipelines to enable continuous testing.
* Identify, debug, and isolate software defects through advanced test automation and analysis.
* Develop tools to simulate production scenarios and edge cases.
* Improve test coverage, testing strategies, and quality engineering practices across teams.
* Contribute to performance, scalability, and reliability testing of applications.
* Mentor engineers on automation best practices and quality engineering principles.



  





**Required Skills and Experience:** 



* Strong hands\\-on experience with modern C\\+\\+ (C\\+\\+11/14/17 or later).
* Experience developing automated testing frameworks or infrastructure.
* Strong understanding of software testing principles and methodologies.
* Experience with unit testing frameworks such as: Google Test (gTest), Catch2, Boost.Test
* Experience building test automation for APIs, backend systems, or distributed systems.
* Solid understanding of data structures, algorithms, and object\\-oriented programming.
* Experience working in Agile development environments.
* Experience integrating tests into CI/CD pipelines.
* Strong debugging, root cause analysis, and problem\\-solving skills

title: ServiceNow ITSM Developer
description:
Greetings from TCS!
   

  

 Job Title: ServiceNow ITSM Developer
   

 Required Skillset: Service NOW SAM, HAM, ITAM
   

 Location: NOIDA
   

 Experience Range: 5\\+ Years

 Technical Comptency • Experience as a ServiceNow ITSM Developer and Implementing Incident Management, Problem Management, Change Management, Knowledge Management, or Service Catalog, Mobile App, Virtual Agent • Ability to configure ServiceNow ITSM applications in alignment with approved design plans • Knowledge of unit testing, system integration testing, performance testing, user acceptance testing, or any client\\-specific testing • Experience with developing ServiceNow software solutions using JavaScript, Jelly, one or more Web Services, XML, HTML and CSS • Familiarity with SQL query creation and LDAP Query for connecting to and pulling data from Oracle, MySQL databases and AD respectively • Worked with and understands the value in creating repeatable processes to design development, test, staging and production environments that are reliable with high availability • Must be ServiceNow Certified Systems Administrator • Should possess knowledge in Agile/Scrum methodology • Basic knowledge with ITIL/industry standards • Knowledge of software development lifecycle (SDLC)
   

 Behavioral competency • Effective communication skills with both non\\-technical and technical audiences (verbal and written) • Excellent Interpersonal skills to work with the project team members collaboratevily • Participate and provide feedback during planning meetings (i.e., pre\\-iteration, and retrospectives)
   

  

 Good To Have:
   

 • ServiceNow Implementation Specialist certification • ITIL V3/V4 foundation certification • Java developer certification
   

  

  

 Responsibility of / Expectations from the Role • Understand the given application requirements (or User Stories) • Understand and follow the Best Practices and Standards/Guidelines for development • Participate in the Daily stand\\-up meetings and understand the changes proposed on the requirements / user stories • Must be self\\-directed and detail oriented in completing assigned tasks in an effective manner, meeting designated standards and criteria • Responsible for the code quality of assigned tasks • Perform Unit Testing and do documentation as required • Provide support to the users during the User Acceptance Testing • Provide any required training to the users on the user stories
   

  

  

  

  

  

  

 Thanks \\& Regards,
   

 Ria Aarthi A.

title: React Native Engineer - 2 to 6 Years Exp
description:
**Role \\- Senior Engineer \\- Frontend \\[React Native], AI HealthTech startup** 




**Experience: 2\\-6 years** 




**Location: Gurgaon, work from office** 




  





**About Tap Health** 




  





 Tap Health is a deep\\-tech digital health startup building AI\\-first digital therapeutics for chronic care between doctor visits.
 



  





 Our flagship product is India’s fully autonomous AI diabetes digital therapeutic that connects the dots across user data to deliver real\\-time guidance on meals, glucose, activity, stress and medication, wrapped in a game\\-like journey designed to keep users addicted \\& engaged, which drives health outcomes. The product has won the Clinical Innovation Award presented by ATTD Asia.
 



  





  





**Role Overview: Senior Engineer \\- Frontend \\[React Native]** 




  





 As a Senior Engineer at Tap Health, you’ll build and maintain our cross\\-platform mobile applications using React Native. You’ll work closely with design, product, and backend teams to deliver high\\-quality, performant, and user\\-friendly experiences on both iOS and Android.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  




* Feature Development: Development of high\\-performance, scalable React Native applications for iOS and Android.
* Code Maintenance: Triage bugs, refactor legacy code, and ensure codebase health and consistency.
* Performance Optimization: Profile and tune app performance (load times, animations, memory usage) for a smooth UX.
* Integration: Connect frontend components with RESTful APIs, GraphQL endpoints, and third\\-party SDKs.
* Testing \\& QA: Write and maintain unit, integration, and UI tests (e.g. Jest, Detox) to ensure stability.
* Collaboration: Participate in sprint planning, code reviews, and pair\\-programming sessions with cross\\-functional peers.
* CI/CD Support: Help maintain automated build, test, and deployment pipelines for mobile releases.



  





**Skills \\& Experience** 




  




* 2\\-6 years of frontend/mobile development experience building production apps with React Native
* Strong familiarity with iOS (Xcode) and Android (Android Studio) toolchains
* Proficient in JavaScript/TypeScript, modern React practices, and state\\-management libraries (Redux, Context API, etc.)
* Experience integrating with RESTful APIs, GraphQL, and handling offline\\-first data
* Solid understanding of mobile performance optimization and memory management
* Comfortable with Git workflows and branching strategies
* Hands\\-on with automated testing tools (Jest, Detox, Appium, etc.)
* Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines for mobile (fastlane, Bitrise, GitHub Actions, etc.)
* Strong UI/UX sensibility and attention to detail
* Familiarity with Agile methodologies (Scrum/Kanban)

title: Software Engineer Intern
description:
**Company Description** 




 Aadhunik AI is a platform dedicated to making artificial intelligence accessible and practical for everyone, from beginners to business professionals. We provide a curated directory of AI tools organized by functionality, real reviews, and expert insights to help users make informed decisions. Our mission is to bridge the gap between AI and everyday users, empowering individuals and businesses with tailored AI\\-driven recommendations. Aadhunik AI is not just a platform but a community aimed at exploring the infinite possibilities of artificial intelligence and driving innovation. Join Aadhunik AI to stay ahead in the world of AI with simplified tools, resources, and expert guidance.
 



  





 At Aadhunik, after years helping people navigate the noise of the AI revolution, from news to
 



 tools to training. We realized that software alone isn't enough to solve the friction of modern life.
 



 Today, we are bringing AI into the physical world. We are building a fleet of companions designed not
 



 just to process data, but to elevate how we live. We have started work on our first robot,
 **NIK** 
 , which is
 



 more than a tool; it is a tireless, judgment\\-free partner built to help you master your day, protect your
 



 focus, and live a better, more intentional life.
 



  





**The Role** 




 We are looking for a highly curious Software Engineering Intern to act as the primary architect for the
 



 robot’s "Brain." You will be responsible for linking our hardware sensors (MIPI cameras, I2S
 



 microphones) to localized AI models, ensuring the robot can see, hear, and converse with near\\-zero
 



 latency.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




 • Voice \\& AI Integration: Write and maintain Python scripts that connect various AI models,
 



 enabling the robot to listen, process language, and generate spoken responses entirely
 



 offline.
 



 • Computer Vision Tasks: Work with live camera feeds and implement computer vision
 



 algorithms (like object detection and facial recognition) so the robot can see and understand
 



 its environment.
 



 • Software Optimization \\& Packaging: Help structure, package, and optimize our code so it runs
 



 smoothly and efficiently on our physical edge computing hardware without lagging.
 



 • Hardware Communication: Write scripts that take software decisions (like locating a person's
 



 face on camera) and translate them into basic data commands for our microcontrollers so the
 



 robot can physically react and move.
 



 • Memory \\& Data Systems: Assist in building and managing local databases that allow the AI to
 



 recall past interactions, giving the robot a sense of long\\-term memory.
 



 • General Engineering Support: Assist the core team with basic software debugging,
 



 researching new open\\-source AI tools, and writing clean documentation for the code you
 



 build.
 



  





**What You Must Have (Requirements)** 




 • Currently pursuing a B.Tech/BE in Computer Science, AI/ML, Electronics, or a related field. Tier 1 Colleges Preferred.
 



 • Strong proficiency in Python (you should be very comfortable writing modular, clean code).
 



 • Experience navigating Linux operating systems via the command line (Ubuntu, SSH, basic
 



 bash scripting).
 



 • A fundamental understanding of how to interact with APIs and open\\-source AI models
 



 (HuggingFace, Ollama, etc.).
 



 • A scrappy, problem\\-solving mindset—hardware development involves debugging complex,
 



 undocumented errors.
 



 Bonus Points (Nice to Have)
 



 • Previous experience working with Single Board Computers (Raspberry Pi, NVIDIA Jetson).
 



 • Experience with C\\+\\+ or basic microcontroller programming.
 



 • A portfolio or GitHub profile showing personal projects related to AI, computer vision, or
 



 hardware.
 



  





**What We Offer** 




 • Experience in working on a lead role and being a part of a very tightknit team of 3\\.
 



 • Hands\\-on experience with hardware that is being assembled in\\-house (based on NVIDIA
 



 Jetson Orin Nano).
 



 • The chance to see your code directly control a physical, autonomous product.
 



 • A Letter of Recommendation and a high\\-impact project to anchor your resume.
 



**This is a Paid Internship with a stipend of 15\\-20K/month.** 




  





**How to Apply** 




**Please share your resume along with a link to your GitHub profile or a portfolio of relevant past** 




**projects to hello@aadhunik.ai** 




 In your email,
 **briefly mention one challenge you anticipate when running an LLM locally on edge hardware and how you might solve it.**
